'''ranuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okanye|okanye]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okanye|okanye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ranuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || rænirith || rænirij || rænirish || ræniri
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ranunuruth || ranunuruj || ranunurush || ranunuru
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ranuruth || ranuruj || ranurush || ranuru
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ranufrufth || ranufrufj || ranufrufsh || ranufruf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ranuruthu || ranuruju || ranurushu || ranuruku
|-
| [[Patient]] || ranuruth || ranuruj || ranurush || ranuru
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ranuruthul || ranurujul || ranurushul || ranurukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ranuruuthuthu || ranuruujuju || ranuruushushu || ranuruuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || ranuruthun || ranurujun || ranurushun || ranurukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ranuruthuoro || ranurujuoro || ranurushuoro || ranurukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
